steps.title: Isolate the square
steps.content:
Add $40$ to both sides, then divide by $8$:
$$
8x^2-40=32
$$
$$
8x^2=72
$$
$$
x^2=9
$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the original equation as written. This gives a quick visual check of the possible intersection values before choosing the positive solution.

steps.title: Use the positive solution
steps.content:
The solutions to $x^2=9$ are:
$$
x=3\quad\text{or}\quad x=-3
$$
The question asks for the positive solution.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the two sides and read the positive intersection. The answer is A.
